title: Endermitium
description: this mod adds a new ore to minecraft (not a regular one)
body:
what does the mod adds?       
the mod adds:       
new loot table (for enderman)       
new matireals       
new set of armor and weapons (sword and scythe)        
new recipes      

what does the mod do?          
the mod does 6 things         
every one of those things are relatead to an item or a tool            
1:endermitium ingot teleports you in a radius of 4k blocks           
2:part of singularity makes a lot of things like teleport you in a radius of 4k blocks, give you one of 3 effects (wither,levation,weakness), can deal 10 damage or it can kill you            
3:singularity will set to you a new spawn point in the whole world clear your inventory and kill you          
4:endermitium sword will teleport youre enemy in a radius of 40 blocks             
5:the scythe will make the opposite it will teleport you in a radius of 40 blocks           
6:full set of endermitium armor will stop the effects from endermitium_ingot,part_of_singularity,singularity

why you need to download this mod?             
because the mod replaces the old loot table of the enderman to a new one with a new matireal and a new expireance of course

critical moments:                  
this mod is one of a series of mods. that series of mods is a part of a bigger project so yeah it's an experement i dont know if i will update it or not
